summary: Reworked the opening handoff to avoid repeating the adjacent chapter's arrival/temporal scaffold and corrected the fruit detail to match chapter 12 while preserving the scene's beats, voice, and blast-to-aftermath continuity.
edits: Rewrote the opening paragraph to start on Elise spotting the cellar light instead of another 'By the time' arrival beat.
Removed the duplicated opening light description that became redundant after the new first paragraph.
Changed the newspaper parcel and blast aftermath fruit references from cherries to apricots for chapter-to-chapter continuity with chapter 12.
